justification: The diff correctly migrates javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence and updates build tooling (Maven compiler, Surefire, JaCoCo, GitHub Actions) to Java 21. It also modernizes string formatting by replacing String.format with the Java 15+ String.formatted() method in test fakes (e.g., FakeCriteriaBuilder.java, FakeFetch.java). However, it misses opportunities to use Java 21 idioms like pattern matching for switch or records in the test fakes, and the maven-compiler-plugin configuration redundantly hardcodes <release>21</release> instead of using the property ${maven.compiler.release} defined earlier.
